feat.name: Fulu Familiar
feat.text: You can imprint your familiar’s spiritual essence into a fulu, a small paper charm that can be affixed to objects, creatures, or structures. You gain the Create Familiar Fulu action, which you can use once per day; at 12th level, this increases to twice per day, and at 18th level, it increases to three times per day.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Talisman
traits.text: A talisman is a small object affixed to armor, a shield, or a weapon (called the affixed item). You must be wielding or wearing an item to activate a talisman attached to it. Once activated, a talisman burns out permanently.

abilities.name: Create Familiar Fulu
abilities.requirement: Your familiar is within 30 feet, and you have one hand free
abilities.text: (concentrate, manipulate) You make a pinching motion, and your familiar dissolves into magical energy that re-forms between your fingers as a fulu magical item. The fulu must be at least two levels lower than your level, and you don’t need to spend the normal monetary cost in magical components or attempt a Crafting check. You can then choose to Affix a Talisman as part of this activity to affix your familiar fulu. While transformed, your familiar doesn’t grant its normal benefits, and it remains transformed until your next daily preparations or until you Activate the fulu, at which point your familiar reappears in an unoccupied space adjacent to you.
